sentences.arabic: لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ لَيْلَةٌ مُبَارَكَةٌ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُبَارَكِ.
sentences.translation: Lejletu-l-kadr je blagoslovljena noć u blagoslovljenom mjesecu ramazanu.
sentences.translationEn: Laylat al-Qadr is a blessed night in the blessed month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «تَحَرَّوْا لَيْلَةَ الْقَدْرِ فِي الْوِتْرِ مِنَ الْعَشْرِ الْأَوَاخِرِ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ فَضْلِ لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: «Tražite Lejletu-l-kadr u neparnim noćima posljednje decenije ramazana» [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o vrijednosti Lejletu-l-kadra].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Seek Laylat al-Qadr in the odd nights of the last ten days of Ramadan' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Merit of Laylat al-Qadr].

sentences.arabic: وَهِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ كَمَا بَيَّنَ الْعُلَمَاءُ.
sentences.translation: Ona je bolja od hiljadu mjeseci, kako su to pojasnili učenjaci.
sentences.translationEn: It is better than a thousand months, as scholars have explained.

sentences.arabic: يُحْيِي الْمُسْلِمُ هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةَ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَالدُّعَاءِ وَالذِّكْرِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman tu noć provodi u namazu, dovi i zikru.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim spends this night in prayer, supplication, and remembrance.

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَغْتَنِمُ الْعَشْرَ الْأَوَاخِرَ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ لِيَتَقَرَّبَ إِلَى اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Pouka je da musliman iskoristi posljednjih deset dana ramazana da se što više približi Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson is that a Muslim makes the most of the last ten days of Ramadan to draw closer to Allah.
